texto: That was my pride and joy - that I made it through all those years of minor hockey without losing any of my teeth; then, I ended up losing them in a car accident in New York when I was riding in a taxi. So, I end up losing my teeth, but not in the glamorous fashion I envisioned.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Glavine sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “That was my pride and joy - that I made it through all those years of minor hockey without losing…” articula amor, joy, losing em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e losing.

frase_original: That was my pride and joy - that I made it through all those years of minor hockey without losing any of my teeth; then, I ended up losing them in a car accident in New York when I was riding in a taxi. So, I end up losing my teeth, but not in the glamorous fashion I envisioned.
